productName: Refine CCELL® FULL SPEC Disposable Bar - 1g - Kush Mintz [ I ]
description: Effortless hybrid disposable vape of Kush Mintz — fully charged out of the box, dialed in for smooth flavor and total convenience. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of menthol, mint, and ammonia, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
